intro: 6 hard problems that drill the A Search Algorithm pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice hard A Search Algorithm problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.
